name: First Bancorp, Inc /ME/
summary: The First Bancorp, Inc. (FNLC) is a Maine-based bank holding company operating through its subsidiary, First National Bank. The company provides banking products and services including deposit accounts, loans, Wealth Management, and Investment Services. It is subject to federal and state financial institution regulations and lists its stock on Nasdaq.
